meta.note: ANSI codes are standard 16-color only. Hex values are for web/documentation use.

primary.usage: Default text, headings, logo, body content

surface_light.usage: Light mode background (web/docs only, terminal inherits theme)

surface_dark.usage: Dark mode background (web/docs only, terminal inherits theme)

allow.usage: Allow verdicts, passing checks, success states

ask.usage: Ask prompts, caution indicators, developer decision required

block.usage: Block/deny verdicts, failed checks, error states

info.usage: File paths, informational highlights, cyan accents

muted.usage: Metadata, timestamps, hashes, session IDs, dim text
